title: Find the top 3 shops by voucher count and show their average voucher values
description: Find the top 3 shops by voucher count and show their average voucher values

steps.description: Count vouchers per shop and get top 3 shops by count
steps.sql: SELECT shop_id, COUNT(*) AS voucher_count FROM tb_voucher GROUP BY shop_id ORDER BY voucher_count DESC LIMIT 3

steps.description: Calculate average voucher value for the top 3 shops
steps.sql: SELECT shop_id, AVG(actual_value) AS avg_actual_value FROM tb_voucher WHERE shop_id IN (1) GROUP BY shop_id
